name: predp-red-skills
description: AI Skills for predp.red prediction market with x402 payment integration on X Layer

scripts.build: npm run build:ppa && npm run build:x402
scripts.build:ppa: cd skills/ppa-market-skill && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:x402: cd skills/predp-red-x402-payment && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:ppa && npm run test:x402
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ppa && npm run lint:x402
